channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rappler Hosts AMA with Navy Spokesperson on Chinese Espionage Cases in the Philippines
item.description: Rappler is set to hold an Ask Me Anything (AMA) session on March 10, 2026, at 2 pm via its app's Security and Global Affairs chat room. The featured guest is Philippine Navy Spokesperson Rear Admiral ...

item.title: Former SANDF soldier charged with murder of wife at Durban restaurant
item.description: Fredrik le Roux, a former South African National Defence Force special forces soldier, is facing charges of premeditated murder following the killing of his wife, Taryn le Roux, at Waxy’s restaurant i...

item.title: Western Bulldogs defeat Brisbane Lions in tight Gabba clash amid Andrews’ MRO review
item.description: The Western Bulldogs pulled off a thrilling win over reigning premiers Brisbane Lions at the Gabba, showcasing their potential as a premiership contender despite missing finals last season. The match ...

item.title: Zanzibar hosts large communal Iftar at Amani Stadium to celebrate Ramadan
item.description: Today, Zanzibar is hosting a large communal Iftar at Amani Stadium, expected to attract around 15,000 people including national leaders, locals, and visitors. The event aims not only to celebrate the ...

item.title: Political Thugs Attack Wike Faction Congresses Across Oyo State
item.description: For Saturday, Oyo State PDP wahala don increase as political thugs storm local government congresses wey dey backed by Minister of FCT, Nyesom Wike. The attacks happen for different areas like Ibadan ...

item.title: Escalation in Middle East: Iran Drone Strike on Dubai Airport Amid US and Israeli Retaliation
item.description: On Saturday, 7 March 2026, tensions in the Middle East sharply escalated as Dubai International Airport was temporarily evacuated following an Iranian suicide drone strike that caused a fire at Termin...

item.title: India captain Suryakumar talks team mindset ahead of T20 World Cup final
item.description: Ahead of the T20 World Cup final at the Narendra Modi Stadium, India’s captain Suryakumar Yadav expressed his excitement and highlighted how the team is preparing to handle both pressure and expectati...

item.title: Hungary detains Ukrainian state bank employees and seizes cash and gold shipment over money laundering suspicions
item.description: Hungarian authorities detained seven Ukrainian citizens, employees of the state-owned Oschadbank, and seized two armoured vehicles transporting substantial sums of money and gold. The shipment include...

item.title: Delta State Stakeholders Hold Workshop to Boost Women’s Leadership and Fight Gender-Based Violence
item.description: Stakeholders for Delta State come together for one important leadership workshop wey dem organise for Asaba by Otdel Health Heritage and Environmental Initiative (OHHEI). The workshop focus on how to ...

item.title: Tourism Opportunities in Ruvuma Region, Southern Tanzania
item.description: Ruvuma region, located in the Southern Highlands of Tanzania, is gaining attention as a growing tourist destination. Named after the Ruvuma River which borders Mozambique, the region offers unique nat...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Aircraft Confronted by Chinese Navy During Routine Scarborough Shoal Patrol
item.description: During a routine patrol over the disputed Scarborough Shoal, a Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) aircraft reportedly encountered a Chinese Navy vessel, which challenged its presence in the area. This incid...

item.title: A Nurse’s Journey Through Endometrial Cancer and Life After Hysterectomy
item.description: Casey Halterman, a nurse from South Carolina, shares her personal journey with stage 3A endometrial adenocarcinoma, a type of uterine cancer. In 2020, she felt an unshakable intuition that something w...

item.title: Alcohol consumption in Canada declines as younger generations adopt a sober lifestyle
item.description: Statistics Canada reports that alcohol sales in Canada have fallen for the fourth consecutive year, marking the largest annual drop in 20 years. Between March 2024 and March 2025, sales of alcoholic b...

item.title: India and New Zealand face off in T20 World Cup final
item.description: India are set to defend their T20 World Cup title as they take on New Zealand, who are chasing their first global white-ball trophy, in a final staged at the massive Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad...

item.title: Two Policemen Killed and Civilians Injured in Wana Market Bomb Explosion
item.description: In South Waziristan’s Rustam Bazaar, a bomb blast on Saturday tragically claimed the lives of two policemen while injuring four others, according to Deputy Superintendent of Police Asghar Ali Shah. Ei...

item.title: Dispute over Santhal event venue between President Murmu and West Bengal government intensifies
item.description: A political controversy has intensified in West Bengal following the last-minute change of venue for an event involving President Droupadi Murmu, who hails from the tribal community. Prime Minister Na...

item.title: Reflecting on the Soham Murders Following Ian Huntley's Death
item.description: The passing of Ian Huntley offers a moment to reflect on one of the most harrowing criminal cases in recent British history. In August 2002, Soham, a small Cambridgeshire village, became the centre of...

item.title: British and French Troops Conduct Military Exercises in Ukraine Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Over 600 British and French paratroopers are currently training together in exercises simulating combat scenarios, ambushes, and defensive operations, preparing for potential involvement in Ukraine. T...

item.title: Union Agriculture Minister Proposes Coconut Oil Inclusion in PDS to Benefit Farmers and Consumers
item.description: On Saturday, Union Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan stated that the Coconut Development Board has formally requested state governments to include coconut oil in the Public Distribution Syste...

item.title: Karachi Universities Shift Morning Classes Online Amid Fuel Price Hike
item.description: Due to the sharp rise in petrol and diesel prices following the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, major universities in Karachi have decided to move their morning classes online. The University of ...
